options.name: -Force
options.description: Cancels all event subscriptions, including subscriptions that were hidden by using the SupportEvent parameter of `Register-ObjectEvent`, `Register-WmiEvent`, and `Register-EngineEvent`.

options.name: -SourceIdentifier
options.description: Specifies a source identifier that this cmdlet cancels event subscriptions.

options.name: -SubscriptionId
options.description: Specifies a source identifier ID that this cmdlet cancels event subscriptions.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.
